text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Tuesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, December 10. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: I can help with that. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I checked the recent logs for that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Budget tracking is updated. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Managing some allergy issues today. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Good focus area. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Budget tracking is updated. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Good focus area. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Busy day at Vertex Health. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
